These bananas have a smooth bright yellow skin. Peel it back to reveal a firm flesh that is mildly sweet. Recharge yourself with a banana after a workout for a guilt-free snack or indulge yourself with it as a topping for your desserts.

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: • Best consumed within 2 days of delivery

displayMetadata.value:
Pineapples have a yellow flesh that has a firm texture and offers a balanced mix of sweetness and acidity. Enjoy it cut up into bite size rings, or use it in cooking to add a touch of sweetness in your dishes.

** Actual product may come in different brand, packaging or/and country of origin depending on the stock availability

• Opt for a refund within 3 days of delivery if your items are not delivered fresh
• Check out our refund policy for fresh in the T&C for more details

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• To maintain its optimum quality for longer, store the item(s) whole in the fridge
• Best consumed within 7 days of delivery
